\section{Control-Plane Architecture}
Target shape and its current state:

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}[node distance=6mm, layer/.style={draw=primary, thick,
  rounded corners=2pt, fill=lightgray!50, minimum width=118mm, align=center,
  font=\small, inner sep=6pt}]
\node[layer] (bs) {\textbf{Portal} --- catalog, search, docs, self-service, ownership\\\scriptsize \textcolor{success}{\textbf{LIVE}} (file-backed catalog)};
\node[layer, below=of bs] (nb) {\textbf{NetBox + Git} --- desired state, assets, physical/logical topology\\\scriptsize \textcolor{accent}{\textbf{GAP}}: dedicated NetBox not yet deployed; Git-backed catalog only};
\node[layer, below=of nb] (col) {\textbf{Collectors / Reconcilers} --- Proxmox, Redfish, LLDP, SNMP, PDU, Prometheus\\\scriptsize \textcolor{success}{\textbf{PARTIAL}}: Proxmox and Prometheus paths exist\\\scriptsize \textcolor{accent}{missing}: Redfish, LLDP, SNMP, PDU reconcilers};
\draw[->, thick, secondary] (bs) -- (nb);
\draw[->, thick, secondary] (nb) -- (col);
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
